name: s09-block-fabrication-blocks-placeholder-doi
notes: A fabricated, placeholder-shaped DOI must be blocked before it is written.

name: s10-block-fabrication-blocks-empty-required-field
notes: An empty required .bib field is a stub reference masquerading as real.

tool_input.content: @article{key, author = {Smith, Jane}, title = {A Real Paper}, journal = {J. Things}, year = {2020}, doi = {10.1021/acs.est.0c01234}}

name: s12-block-fabrication-allows-prose-placeholder

tool_input.content: PFAS removal reached high efficiency [CITE]. The mean was [VALUE -- verify].

notes: Honest prose placeholders are the CORRECT behavior — never block them.

name: s13-block-fabrication-bypassed-with-approved
notes: RESEARCH_APPROVED=1 bypasses for independently verified imports.
